channel.title: Oil-Immersed Transformers on Zan
channel.description: Recent content in Oil-Immersed Transformers on Zan

item.title: 110 kV Oil-Immersed Transformer
item.description: This 110 kV oil-immersed transformer is designed for regional grid interconnection, urban substations, and energy-intensive plants that demand high reliability and long service intervals. It supports efficient power transmission, reduced lifecycle energy consumption, and robust thermal performance for continuous operation.

item.title: 220 kV Oil-Immersed Transformer
item.description: This 220 kV class transformer supports backbone transmission projects and large-scale substation expansion where high capacity and system stability are essential. It is engineered to handle severe operating environments, improve grid security, and meet demanding utility performance requirements.

item.title: 3D Wound-Core Transformer
item.description: Compared with conventional laminated cores, this 3D wound-core transformer delivers improved magnetic flux continuity, lower vibration, and better efficiency at partial loads. It is ideal for urban distribution, data-supporting infrastructure, and noise-sensitive installations.

item.title: Amorphous 3D Wound-Core Transformer
item.description: This series integrates amorphous alloy core technology and three-dimensional wound-core structure to minimize no-load losses and improve lifecycle energy performance. It is highly suitable for users aiming at strict efficiency targets, lower emissions, and future-ready power systems.

item.title: S13 Oil-Immersed Transformer
item.description: The S13 series is widely selected for energy-saving distribution projects where users need lower no-load loss, quieter operation, and dependable voltage quality. It is suitable for industrial parks, public infrastructure, and commercial power systems seeking long-term operating cost optimization.

item.title: S20 Oil-Immersed Transformer
item.description: Built for high-standard efficiency projects, the S20 series helps utilities and industrial users reduce annual energy losses while maintaining stable output and strong overload resilience. It is a preferred choice for green manufacturing facilities and new distribution network retrofits.

item.title: S22 Oil-Immersed Transformer
item.description: The S22 series targets advanced power users that prioritize superior efficiency and sustainability outcomes. With reduced no-load and load losses, it helps cut operating expenses and supports ESG-oriented power infrastructure modernization.
